label_notes: Source: training knowledge (live fetch blocked). Target emphasizes does not sell data to third parties for their marketing. Operates loyalty program (RedCard, Target Circle) that collects additional data. Shares with advertising partners for targeted campaigns. Transparency gaps around AI use and data portability.
